      [32m+[0m [0m[1m[0marn[0m[0m         = (known after apply)

              [32m+[0m [0m"SLACK_CHANNEL"     = "notification-scratch-ops"
              [32m+[0m [0m"SLACK_EMOJI"       = ":rotating_light:"

              [32m+[0m [0m"SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" = (sensitive value)
            }
        }

      [32m+[0m [0mtracing_config {
          [32m+[0m [0m[1m[0mmode[0m[0m = (known after apply)
        }
    }

                        ]

                    },
                ]
              [32m+[0m [0mVersion   = "2012-10-17"
            }
